label: Hightouch
description: Sync data from your warehouse to any business tool using Hightouch's reverse ETL platform.

form.title: Connect Hightouch
form.subtitle: Paste your Hightouch API token to let Anton manage syncs and models.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste a Hightouch API token generated from Workspace Settings → API Tokens. Quickest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Hightouch API Token

1. Log in to [Hightouch](https://app.hightouch.com).
2. Click your workspace name in the top-left corner to open workspace settings.
3. In the left sidebar, go to **Settings → API tokens**.
4. Click **Create API token**.
5. Give the token a descriptive name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. Choose the appropriate permission level:
   - **Read-only** — if Anton only needs to read sync statuses and model definitions.
   - **Full access** — if Anton needs to trigger syncs or manage models.
7. Click **Create** and copy the token immediately — it is shown only once.
8. Paste the token into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- Tokens are workspace-scoped. If you have multiple Hightouch workspaces, generate a token in each one you want Anton to access.
- If you lose the token, delete it in **Settings → API tokens** and create a new one — then update it in Anton.
- The token grants access to all resources in that workspace, so treat it like a password.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found in Hightouch → Settings → API tokens. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: workspace_slug
fields.label: Workspace Slug
fields.description: Optional. Your Hightouch workspace slug (visible in the URL: app.hightouch.com/<slug>). Used to scope API calls if you manage multiple workspaces.
